morningBrief.headline: Winter Delivered Big
morningBrief.body: 9.1" dumped overnight. The stashes are loaded and the groomers are buried. Ski patrol opened 3 additional trails. A few more choices today. Cold day ahead: 19.4° high. Dress warmly.

trends: Great week for snow - 12.6" in last 7 days
recommendations: Fresh corduroy on Meadowlark - challenging for advanced skiers

morningBrief.headline: Mother Nature Can't Decide
morningBrief.body: Powder alert: 8.7" of fresh overnight means soft conditions across the mountain. Mixed precipitation expected. Rain at base, snow up top. Dress in layers.

morningBrief.headline: Sunday Skiing
morningBrief.body: The rundown: 52 trails open, 25 groomed. Unknown with temps around 23°.

morningBrief.headline: Spring Vibes
morningBrief.body: 7 of 15 trails are open with 6 groomed. Mostly Cloudy with a high of 52°F. Warmer temps with a high of 52°. Snow will soften up by afternoon.

morningBrief.headline: Rain at Base, Snow Up Top
morningBrief.body: 12 of 14 trails are open with 12 groomed. Rain/Snow with a high of 39°F. Mixed precipitation expected. Rain at base, snow up top. Dress in layers.
